label: Engineering Infrastructure & Quality Gates

commits.description: CI quality gates with layered regression detection
Superset tolerance strategy doc + GitHub runner notice
Audit archive, runbook, release checklist, AGENTS.md anchor
Phase 8A batch runner + baseline + Phase 8E acceptance

core_gate.command: pytest tests/test_validator*.py tests/test_domain*.py tests/test_ir*.py tests/test_vendor*.py tests/test_parser*.py tests/test_renderer*.py tests/test_schema_contract.py tests/test_integration_phase*.py

performance_baseline.detail: 20 tasks, 0 errors, ~9500 t/s, 11 PASS/9 expected FAIL

known_limits: OSPF not in VERIFIABLE_FEATURE_REGISTRY (3 blocking conditions documented in core/validator/capability_baseline.py)
Rule fallback does not cover NAT/AAA/QoS advanced features
SemanticMemory uses word matching not embeddings
Pre-existing uncommitted code (validator/*, tests/*_production.py, etc.) predate Phase 8 — not in scope
CI workflow grammar verified but not run on GitHub-hosted Actions runner
next_actions: Push to GitHub-hosted repo and validate CI workflow end-to-end
Phase 9 planning: OSPF registry re-evaluation, full pipeline benchmark with LLM
Reconciliation pass for pre-existing uncommitted code (validator/*, test_*_production.py, etc.)
Consider SQLite WAL for ProjectStore in high-concurrency scenarios
